![](https://api-docs.innovestxonline.com/static/media/INVX_LOGO.ee56d5e4fa88de26e380.png)

InnovestX APIs allow you to integrate our digital asset features into your business's applications and services. To access the APIs, you must have InnovestX account with digital asset portfolio

## API Key Setup

### How to create a new API Key

1\. Sign in to [trade.innovestxonline.com](https://trade.innovestxonline.com/)  
2\. Go to Account

![](data:image/png;base64,)

and select API Keys

![](data:image/png;base64,)

3\. Select Generate API Key  
4\. Choose API key permission to allow the API key to access  
5\. Enter IP addresses for access restrictions (If any)  
6\. Review your API Key, and then proceed by clicking "Generate"  
7\. Complete Two-Factor Authentication process [(see how to register Two-Factor Authentication)](https://www.innovestx.co.th/products/product-user-guide/detail/manual/2-factor-authentication)  
8\. Store your API key and secret in secure location. The API secret will be displayed only once upon successfully generating the API key.

![](https://api-docs.innovestxonline.com/static/media/keySetUpImage.9948d2710866b8e36665.png)

## Authenticate Message

### Request Header

| Field | Data type | Length | Mandatory | Description | Example |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| X-INVX-APIKEY | String | 64 | M | Key that InnovestX assign to each channel for authorization **(Length 64)** |  |
| X-INVX-SIGNATURE | String |  | M | sha256.hmac(string\_to\_sign, api\_secret) |  |
| X-INVX-REQUEST-UID | String | 36 | M | A unique identifier to track the current request call | 019d1bae-e2f1-42d9-b9e8-23d495dbe9f9 |
| X-INVX-TIMESTAMP | String | 13 | M | Request departure timestamp UTC in milliseconds. If timestamp is more than 150 seconds from current server time, it will not allow to make the request. | 1567755304968 |
| X-INVX-APIKEY | String | 64 | M | Key that InnovestX assign to each channel for authorization **(Length 64)** |  |
| Accept-language | String |  | O | Values:  
\- EN (default)  
\- TH |  |
| Application-Reference | String | 50 | O | channel name |  |
| Content-Type | String | 50 | M | Content type JSON | application/json |

  

Example NodeJS

```
const axios = require("axios");
const uuid = require("uuid");
const CryptoJS = require("crypto-js");

const requestUId = uuid.v4();
const public_key =
  "03e8b94ce5194678bb9b8938274ba437bc9fb653bf9b4e199ebbc8d51566b9cc";
const private_key = "b76487089ff240988542a61a9bbaacb5";
const contentType = "application/json";
const timestamp = new Date().getTime();
const host = "api-dev.innovestxonline.com";
const path = "/api/v1/digital-asset/orderbook/lvl2";
const query = "";
const method = "POST";

let body = {
  symbol: "ETHTHB",
};

const content_to_sign =
  public_key +
  method +
  host +
  path +
  query +
  contentType +
  requestUId +
  timestamp +
  JSON.stringify(body);

const signature = CryptoJS.enc.Hex.stringify(
  CryptoJS.HmacSHA256(content_to_sign, private_key)
);

axios({
  method: method,
  url: 'https://api.innovestxonline.com/api/v1/digital-asset/orderbook/lvl2',
  headers: {
    "Content-Type": contentType,
    "X-INVX-REQUEST-UID": requestUId,
    "X-INVX-TIMESTAMP": timestamp,
    "X-INVX-SIGNATURE": signature,
    "X-INVX-APIKEY": public_key,
  },
  data: JSON.stringify(body),
})
  .then((response) => {
    console.log(response.data);
  })
  .catch((error) => {
    console.error(error.message);
  });
```

### Create Signature

The X-INVX-SIGNATURE header is generated by creating a sha256 HMAC object using the API secret key on the string :

The following have to be combined into a single string:

X-INVX-APIKEY +  
HTTP Verb +  
url.host +  
url.path +  
url.query +  
Content-Type +  
X-INVX-REQUEST-UID +  
X-INVX-TIMESTAMP +  
request.body

| Field | Description |
| --- | --- |
| X-INVX-APIKEY | Same as authorization header. |
| HTTP Verb | The HTTP (uppercase) verb.
Example: "GET", "POST"

 |
| url.host | The hostname (lowercase), matching the HTTP "Host" request header field (including any port number).

Example: "api.innovestxonline.com"

 |
| url.path | The HTTP request path with leading slash.

Example: "/api/v1/digital-asset/order/send"

 |
| url.query | Any query parameters or empty string. This should be the exact string sent by the client, including urlencoding.

Example: "?limit=100&sort=asc"

 |
| Content-Type | Same as authorization header. |
| X-INVX-REQUEST-UID | Same as authorization header. |
| X-INVX-TIMESTAMP | Same as authorization header. |
| request.body | As is. |

## Standard Error Codes

| Http code | Error code | Error message | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 200 | 0000 | Success | A successful response |
| 400 | 4001 | Reject transaction | The transaction is rejected |
| 403 | 4002 | Invalid X-INVX-APIKEY | X-API-Key is invalid |
| 403 | 4003 | Invalid IP Whitelist | The IP address does not have the permission to access the API key |
| 403 | 4004 | X-INVX-APIKEY Permission Denied | The API key does not have the permission to call the endpoint |
| 403 | 4005 | Invalid X-INVX-SIGNATURE | Signed signature is incorect |
| 403 | 4007 | Invalid Request | Request input does not satisfty |
| 403 | 4008 | Invalid X-INVX-REQUEST-UID | Invalid X-INVX-REQUEST-UID |
| 403 | 4010 | Invalid timestamp format | Timestamp format should be UTC in milliseconds. Example "1567755304968" |
| 403 | 4011 | Departure timestamp is more than 150 seconds from current server time | If timestamp is more than 150 seconds from current server time, it will not allow to make the request |
| 403 | 4012 | Invalid Signature | Invalid Signature |
| 400 | 4013 | Invalid {error message} | Generic error response applying to different cases |
| 400 | 4014 | LimitPrice must not be null | Limit price is required |
| 400 | 4015 | Quantity or value must not be null | Quantity or value is required |
| 400 | 4016 | Invalid datetime format | Datetime format should be YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss.sssZ |
| 400 | 4017 | Below minimum amount | The amount must be higher than minimum amount |
| 400 | 4018 | Exceed maximum amount | The amount must not exceed maximum amount |
| 400 | 4019 | Insufficient Balance | Insufficient Balance |
| 400 | 4020 | Parameter is missing | Parameter is missing |
| 400 | 4021 | The parameter {filled name} must be of type {data type} | Data type is incorrect |
| 400 | 4022 | Input must not be null | Input must not be null |
| 404 | 4041 | Data not found | General data not found |
| 404 | 4042 | Symbol not found | Incorrect symbol format or it is not in the list |
| 404 | 4043 | Product not found | Product not found |
| 500 | 9100 | Internal Server Error | Internal Server Error |
| 500 | 9999 | External Service Error | External Service Error |

## REST API Overview

InnovestX RESTful API enables you to effectively handle digital asset's orders, account balance tracking, wallet management, and grants access to order book information, ticker activity updates, trade execution, and fund transfers.

To execute any API operation, [API key authentication](https://api-docs.innovestxonline.com/#authenticate-message) is mandatory, and each API is limited to performing only the specified permissions assigned to it.

**API Endpoint URL :** /api/v1/digital-asset/{path}

| API | Method | Path | Required Permissions |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Subscribe Level 2 | POST | /orderbook/lvl2 | Trading, Read |
| Subscribe Ticker | POST | /ticker/subscribe | Trading, Read |
| Send Order | POST | /order/send | Trading |
| Cancel Order | POST | /order/cancel | Trading |
| Get Open Orders | GET | /order/open/inquiry | Trading, Read |
| Get Order History | POST | /order/history/inquiry | Trading, Read |
| Get Estimate Fee | POST | /order/fee/inquiry | Trading, Read |
| Get Account Trade | POST | /account/trade/inquiry | Trading, Read |
| Get Account Balance | GET | /account/balance/inquiry | Trading, Withdraw, Deposit, Read |
| Deposits Fiat | POST | /deposit/fiat/create | Deposit |
| Get Deposit Ticket | POST | /deposit/inquiry | Deposit, Read |
| Get All Deposit Tickets | POST | /deposit/all/inquiry | Deposit, Read |
| Get Deposit Wallet Address | POST | /deposit/address/inquiry | Deposit, Read |
| Get Withdraw Wallet Address | POST | /withdraw/address/inquiry | Withdraw, Read |
| Withdraws Fiat | POST | /withdraw/fiat/create | Withdraw |
| Withdraws Crypto | POST | /withdraw/crypto/create | Withdraw |
| Get Withdrawal Fee | POST | /withdraw/fee | Withdraw, Read |
| Cancel Withdraw | POST | /withdraw/cancel | Withdraw |
| Get Withdrawal Ticket | POST | /withdraw/inquiry | Withdraw, Read |
| Get All Withdrawal Tickets | POST | /withdraw/all/inquiry | Withdraw, Read |
| Get Products | GET | /products | Read |
| Get Symbols | GET | /symbols | Read |
| Get Product Fee Tier | POST | /product/fee/tier | Read |
| Get Symbol Fee Tier | POST | /symbol/fee/tier | Read |

## API Permissions

The permission of each API key will determines the accessibility to endpoints. It can be specified during the generation process. All permission type will have the same API key authentication method

| Permission | Description |
| --- | --- |
| Trading | Execute orders and retrieve trading data, including order book and ticker activity |
| Deposit | Initiate deposit request and retrieve relevant data information |
| Withdraw | Initiate withdraw request and retrieve relevant data information |
| Read | Retrieve various account data, including balances, transaction history, and more |

## Subscribe Level 2

POST /api/v1/digital-asset/orderbook/lvl2

**Permission**: Read, Trading

Fetches latest Level 2 ticker data for a particular symbol and set up continuous updates for Level 2 market data events. With Level 2, the user can define the desired depth of market information for both the bid and ask sides.

### Request Body

| Field | Mandatory | Data type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| symbol | Mandatory | String | Trading symbol, e.g., BTCTHB. |
| depth | Optional | Integer | The number of records to be returned, default at 100 |

Example Request

```
{
    "symbol": "BTCTHB",
    "depth": 100 
}
```

### Response

| Field | Data type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| code | String |  |
| message | String |  |
| data\[\].mdUpdateId | Integer | Market Data Update ID.refers to a sequential ID identifies the order in which the update was created. |
| data\[\].actionDateTime | String | The specific date and time that the snapshot was captured or the event occurred |
| data\[\].actionType | Integer | This value shows whether this data is:  
**0** new  
**1** update  
**2** deletion |
| data\[\].lastTradePrice | String | The price at which the symbol was last traded. |
| data\[\].noOfOrders | Integer | Total number of orders |
| data\[\].price | String | Bid or Ask price for the quantity |
| data\[\].quantity | String | Quantity available at a given Bid or Ask price |
| data\[\].side | Integer | One of:  
**0** Buy  
**1** Sell |

Example Response

```
{
    "code": "0000",
    "message": "SUCCESS",
    "data": [
        {
            "mdUpdateId": 15646698,
            "actionDateTime": "2023-04-19T03:44:14.696Z",
            "actionType": 0,
            "lastTradePrice": "1009796.09000000",
            "noOfOrders": 1,
            "price": "185734.94000000",
            "quantity": "0.00200000",
            "side": 0
        },
        {
            "mdUpdateId": 15646698,
            "actionDateTime": "2023-04-19T03:44:14.696Z",
            "actionType": 0,
            "lastTradePrice": "1009796.09000000",
            "noOfOrders": 1,
            "price": "183168.28000000",
            "quantity": "0.00200000",
            "side": 0
        }
    ]
}
```

## Subscribe Ticker

POST /api/v1/digital-asset/ticker/subscribe

**Permission**: Read, Trading

Retrieve ticker market data feed for a particular symbol in 1 minute interval, including trading activity and price movements associated with the specific symbol

### Request Body

| Field | Mandatory | Data type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| symbol | Mandatory | String | The symbol parameter specifies the desired ticker market data to track, such as BTCTHB |

Example Request

```
{
    "symbol": BTCTHB 
}
```

### Response

| Field | Data type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| code | String |  |
| message | String |  |
| data\[\].dateTime | String | The specific date and time that the snapshot was captured or the event occurred |
| data\[\].high | String | The highest recorded price for the symbol during a specific interval |
| data\[\].low | String | The lowest recorded price for the symbol during a specific interval |
| data\[\].open | String | The price at which the symbol started trading at the beginning of a specific interval |
| data\[\].close | String | The price at which the symbol finished trading at the end of a specific interval |
| data\[\].volume | String | The total quantity of the symbol traded during a specific interval |
| data\[\].insideBidPrice | String | The highest price that a buyer is willing to pay for the symbol at a given moment |
| data\[\].insideaskPrice | String | The lowest price at which a seller is willing to sell the symbol at a given moment |
| data\[\].symbol | String | A specified symbol being tracked |

Example Response

```
{
    "code": "0000",
    "message": "SUCCESS",
    "data": [
        {
            "dateTime": "2023-06-14T08:47:00.000Z",
            "high": "896789.99000000",
            "low": "896789.99000000",
            "open": "896789.99000000",
            "close": "896789.99000000",
            "volume": "0.00000000",
            "insideBidPrice": "892910.64000000",
            "insideAskPrice": "896789.99000000",
            "symbol": "BTCTHB"
        }
  ]
}
```

## Send Order

POST /api/v1/digital-asset/order/send

**Permission**: Trading

Create an order for buying and selling assets

### Request Body

| Field | Mandatory | Data type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| symbol | Mandatory | String | Trading symbol, e.g., BTCTHB. |
| timeInForce | Mandatory | Integer | An integer that represents the period during which the new order is executable. One of:  
**1** GTC (good 'til canceled, the default) |
| clientOrderID | Optional | Long Integer | A user-assigned ID for the order, similar to a purchase order number used by companies, which helps in identifying and tracking future updates or changes related to this specific order. |
| side | Mandatory | Integer | A numerical representation indicating one of the potential sides of a trade  
**0** Buy  
**1** Sell |
| quantity | Conditional Mandatory | Decimal | \*The quantity of the asset being ordered. |
| orderType | Mandatory | Integer | An order type identifier represented by a number.  
**1** Market  
**2** Limit |
| limitPrice | Mandatory | Decimal | If the order is a Limit order, the price specified is the execution price for the order. |
| value | Conditional Mandatory | Decimal | \*The value of THB to be initiated in an order. |

**\*Note** - Both quantity and value should be as optional but mandatory to provide one of them.

Example Request

```
{
    "symbol": "XRPTHB",
    "timeInForce": 1,
    "side": 0,
    "quantity": 0.1,
    "orderType": 2,
    "limitPrice": 70,
    "clientOrderId": 10500
}
```

### Response

| Field | Data type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| code | String |  |
| message | String |  |
| data.orderId | Long Integer | A unique identifier assigned to an order for tracking and referencing purposes |

Example Response

```
{
    "code": "0000",
    "message": "SUCCESS",
    "data": {
        "orderId": 1
    }
}
```

## Cancel Order

POST /api/v1/digital-asset/order/cancel

**Permission**: Trading

To cancel an open order that has been placed but is not yet fully executed.

### Request Body

| Field | Mandatory | Data type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| clientOrderId | Conditional Mandatory | Long Integer | A user-assigned ID for the order, similar to a purchase order number used by companies, which helps in identifying and tracking future updates or changes |
| orderId | Conditional Mandatory | Long Integer | A unique identifier assigned to an order |

**\*Note** - Both clientOrderId and orderId should be as optional but mandatory to provide one of them.

Example Request

```
{
    "clientOrderId": 10300,
    "orderId": null 
}
```

### Response

| Field | Data type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| code | String |  |
| message | String |  |
| data.detail | String | Detail response of cancel order (if any) |

Example Response

```
{
    "code": "0000",
    "message": "SUCCESS"
}
```

Example Response

```
{
    "code": "1001",
    "message": "Reject transaction",
    "data": {
        "detail": "Resource Not Found"
    }
}
```

## Get Open Orders

GET /api/v1/digital-asset/order/open/inquiry

**Permission**: Read, Trading

Retrieves open orders for an account

### Response

| Field | Data type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| code | String |  |
| message | String |  |
| data\[\].side | Integer | A numerical representation indicating one of the potential sides of a trade  
**0** Buy  
**1** Sell |
| data\[\].orderId | Long Integer | A unique identifier assigned to an order |
| data\[\].price | String | The unit price at which a trade is executed |
| data\[\].quantity | String | The quantity of the asset being ordered. |
| data\[\].symbol | String | Trading symbol, e.g., BTCTHB. |
| data\[\].orderType | String | An order type identifier represented by a number.  
**1** Market  
**2** Limit |
| data\[\].clientOrderId | Long Integer | A user-assigned ID for the order, similar to a purchase order number used by companies, which helps in identifying and tracking future updates or changes. |
| data\[\].orderState | String | The current state of the order. One of:  
**0** Unknown  
**1** Working  
**2** Rejected  
**3** Canceled  
**4** Expired  
**5** Fully Executed |
| data\[\].receiveDateTime | String | Time stamp of the order |
| data\[\].origQuantity | String | The original quantity of the order being created |
| data\[\].quantityExecuted | String | The quantity that has been executed if the open order has been at least partially executed |
| data\[\].avgPrice | String | The average executed price for the instrument in the order. |
| data\[\].changeReason | String | If the order has been changed, this string value holds the reason. One of:  
**0** Unknown  
**1** NewInputAccepted  
**2** NewInputRejected  
**3** OtherRejected  
**4** Expired  
**5** Trade  
**6** SystemCanceled\_NoMoreMarket  
**7** SystemCanceled\_BelowMinimum  
**8** SystemCanceled\_PriceCollar  
**9** SystemCanceled\_MarginFailed  
**100** UserModified |
| data\[\].origOrderId | Long Integer | If the order has been changed, this is the ID of the original order. |
| data\[\].origCiOrdId | Long Integer | If the order has been changed, this is the ID of the original client order ID. |
| data\[\].insideAsk | String | If this order is a quote, this value is the Inside Ask price. |
| data\[\].insideAskSize | String | If this order is a quote, this value is the quantity of the Inside Ask quote. |
| data\[\].insideBid | String | If this order is a quote, this value is the Inside Bid price. |
| data\[\].insideBidSize | String | If this order is a quote, this value is the quantity of the Inside Bid quote. |
| data\[\].lastTradePrice | String | The last price that this instrument traded at. |
| data\[\].rejectReason | String | If this open order has been rejected, this string holds the reason for the rejection. |
| data\[\].cancelReason | String | If this order has been canceled, this string holds the cancelation reason. |

Example Response

```
{
    "code": "0000",
    "message": "SUCCESS",
    "data": [
        {
            "side": "Buy",
            "orderId": 1,
            "price": "1000.0000000",
            "quantity": "0.01000000",
            "symbol": "BTCTHB",
            "orderType": "Limit",
            "clientOrderId": 0,
            "orderState": "Working",
            "receiveDateTime": "2023-05-03T00:00:00.646Z",
            "origQuantity": "0.01000000",
            "quantityExecuted": "10.0000000",
            "avgPrice": "10.0000000",
            "changeReason": "NewInputAccepted",
            "origOrderId": 1,
            "origCiOrdId": 0,
            "insideAsk": "123.0000000",
            "insideAskSize": "100.0000000",
            "insideBid": "100.00000000"",
            "insideBidSize": "3.00000000",
            "isQuote": false,
            "lastTradePrice": "123.00000000",
            "rejectReason": "",
            "cancelReason": ""
        }
    ]
}
```

## Get Order History

POST /api/v1/digital-asset/order/history/inquiry

**Permission**: Read, Trading

Retrieves all order history in a list or a specific order as specified in the request field.

### Request Body

| Field | Mandatory | Data type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| symbol | Mandatory | String | Trading symbol, e.g., BTCTHB. |
| orderId | Optional | Long Integer | A unique identifier assigned to an order. If the order ID is not specified, it will provide the entire order list. |
| tradeId | Optional | Long Integer | A unique identifier assigned to a matched trade |
| startTimeStamp | Optional | String | The specified starting time to inquire specific order history |
| endTimeStamp | Optional | String | The specified ending time to inquire specific order history |
| depth | Optional | Integer | The number of records to be returned, default at 200 |
| startIndex | Optional | Integer | The starting index for deposit ticket, default at 0, corresponding to the latest transaction |
| clientOrderId | Optional | Long Integer | A user-assigned ID for the order, similar to a purchase order number used by companies, which helps in identifying and tracking future updates or changes. |

Example Request

```
{
    "orderId": null,
    "tradeId": null,
    "startTimeStamp": "2023-04-05T10:52:06.868Z",
    "endTimeStamp":  "2023-04-28T10:52:06.868Z",
    "depth": 2,
    "startIndex": null,
    "clientOrderId": null
}
```

### Response

| Field | Data type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| code | String |  |
| message | String |  |
| data\[\].side | Integer | A numerical representation indicating one of the potential sides of a trade  
**0** Buy  
**1** Sell |
| data\[\].orderId | Long Integer | A unique identifier assigned to an order |
| data\[\].price | String | The unit price at which a trade is executed |
| data\[\].origQuantity | String | The original quantity of the order being created |
| data\[\].quantityExecuted | String | The quantity that has been executed if the open order has been at least partially executed |
| data\[\].symbol | String | Trading symbol, e.g., BTCTHB. |
| data\[\].orderType | String | An order type identifier represented by a number.  
**1** Market  
**2** Limit |
| data\[\].clientOrderId | Long Integer | A user-assigned ID for the order, similar to a purchase order number used by companies, which helps in identifying and tracking future updates or changes. |
| data\[\].orderState | String | The current state of the order. One of:  
**0** Unknown  
**1** Working  
**2** Rejected  
**3** Canceled  
**4** Expired  
**5** Fully Executed |
| data\[\].receiveDateTime | String | Time stamp of the order |
| data\[\].avgPrice | String | The average executed price for the instrument in the order. |
| data\[\].changeReason | String | If the order has been changed, this string value holds the reason. One of:  
**0** Unknown  
**1** NewInputAccepted  
**2** NewInputRejected  
**3** OtherRejected  
**4** Expired  
**5** Trade  
**6** SystemCanceled\_NoMoreMarket  
**7** SystemCanceled\_BelowMinimum  
**8** SystemCanceled\_PriceCollar  
**9** SystemCanceled\_MarginFailed  
**100** UserModified |
| data\[\].origOrderId | Long Integer | If the order has been changed, this is the ID of the original order. |
| data\[\].origCiOrdId | Long Integer | If the order has been changed, this is the ID of the original client order ID. |
| data\[\].insideAsk | String | If this order is a quote, this value is the Inside Ask price. |
| data\[\].insideAskSize | String | If this order is a quote, this value is the quantity of the Inside Ask quote. |
| data\[\].insideBid | String | If this order is a quote, this value is the Inside Bid price. |
| data\[\].insideBidSize | String | If this order is a quote, this value is the quantity of the Inside Bid quote. |
| data\[\].lastTradePrice | String | The last price that this instrument traded at. |
| data\[\].rejectReason | String | If this open order has been rejected, this string holds the reason for the rejection. |
| data\[\].cancelReason | String | If this order has been canceled, this string holds the cancelation reason. |

Example Response

```
{
    "code": "0000",
    "message": "SUCCESS",
    "data": [
        {
            "side": "Sell",
            "orderId": 1,
            "price": "10.00000000",
            "origQuantity": "0.30000000",
            "quantityExecuted": "0.30000000",
            "symbol": "XRPTHB",
            "orderType": "Market",
            "clientOrderId": 777777,
            "orderState": "FullyExecuted",
            "receiveDateTime": "2023-04-28T00:00:00.314Z",
            "avgPrice": "9.0000000",
            "changeReason": "Trade",
            "origOrderId": 1,
            "origClOrdId": 777777,
            "insideAsk": "80.00000000",
            "insideAskSize": "11.99000000",
            "insideBid": "79.00000000",
            "insideBidSize": "2.00000000",
            "isQuote": false,
            "lastTradePrice": "79.00000000",
            "rejectReason": "",
            "cancelReason": ""
        }
    ]
}
```

## Get Estimate Fee

POST /api/v1/digital-asset/order/fee/inquiry

**Permission**: Read, Trading

Returns an estimate of the transaction fee for a specified order.

### Request Body

| Field | Mandatory | Data type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| symbol | Mandatory | String | Trading symbol, e.g., BTCTHB. |
| symbol | Mandatory | String | Trading symbol, e.g., BTCTHB. |
| amount | Mandatory | Decimal | Unit amount of the product, e.g., 100 or 116.25. |
| price | Mandatory | Decimal | The unit price at which a trade is executed |
| side | Mandatory | Integer | A numerical representation indicating one of the potential sides of a trade  
**0** Buy  
**1** Sell |

Example Request

```
{
    "symbol": "BTCTHB",
    "amount": 0.005,
    "price": 77,
    "side": 1
}
```

### Response

| Field | Data type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| code | String |  |
| message | String |  |
| data.orderFee | String | Trading fee associated with placing an order for a product |
| data.product | String | The product indicating the fee charged for a specified order, for example, the trading fee is charged in BTC. |

Example Response

```
{
    "code": "0000",
    "message": "SUCCESS",
    "data": {
        "orderFee": "0.02000000",
        "product": "THB"
    }
}
```

## Get Account Trade

POST /api/v1/digital-asset/account/trade/inquiry

**Permission**: Read, Trading

Retrieve trade history of an account. By default, it retrieves the 200 most recent transactions, starting from the latest trade execution (index 0). The index value increases incrementally as trade executions move further into the past.

### Request Body

| Field | Mandatory | Data type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| orderId | Optional | Long Integer | A unique identifier assigned to an order for tracking and referencing purposes |
| tradeId | Optional | Long Integer | A unique identifier assigned to a matched trade as a reference for that particular transaction |
| startTimeStamp | Optional | String | The specified starting time to inquire about trade history, formatted as YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss.sssZ. |
| endTimeStamp | Optional | String | The specified ending time to inquire about trade history, formatted as YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss.sssZ. |
| depth | Optional | Integer | The number of trade history entries, set at 200, default at 200 |
| index | Optional | Integer | The starting point within the trade history, starting from 0, which indicates the most recent trade. |

Example Request

```
{
    "orderId": null,
    "tradeId": null,
    "startTimeStamp": "2023-04-05T10:52:06.868Z",
    "endTimeStamp":  "2023-04-28T10:52:06.868Z",
    "depth": 2,
    "index": null
}
```

### Response

| Field | Data type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| code | String |  |
| message | String |  |
| data\[\].symbol | String | Trading symbol, e.g., BTCTHB. |
| data\[\].orderId | Long Integer | A unique identifier assigned to an order |
| data\[\].tradeId | Long Integer | A unique identifier assigned to a matched trade |
| data\[\].clientOrderId | Long Integer | A user-assigned ID for the order, similar to a purchase order number used by companies, which helps in identifying and tracking future updates or changes |
| data\[\].orderType | String | An order type identifier represented by a number.  
**1** Market  
**2** Limit |
| data\[\].side | String | A numerical representation indicating one of the potential sides of a trade  
**0** Buy  
**1** Sell |
| data\[\].quantity | String | The quantity of the asset being ordered. |
| data\[\].remainingQuantity | String | The number of units remaining to be traded after the current order execution |
| data\[\].price | String | The unit price at which a trade is executed |
| data\[\].value | String | The total value of a transaction that is calculated as unit price \* quantity executed. |
| data\[\].orderTradeRevision | Integer | The revision number of a trade |
| data\[\].fee | String | Trading fee associated with the trade |
| data\[\].orderOriginator | Integer | The ID of the user who initiated the trade. |
| data\[\].tradeDateTime | String | The trade date and time of execution, formatted as YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss.sssZ. |
| data\[\].makerTaker | String | One of the following potential liquidity provider of a trade:  
Maker  
Taker |
| data\[\].feeProduct | String | The product in which the fee was levied. |
| data\[\].insideBid | String | The best (highest) price of the buy side of the order book at the time of the trade. |
| data\[\].insideBidSize | String | The quantity of the best (highest) price of the buy side of the order book at the time of the trade. |
| data\[\].insideAsk | String | The best (lowest) price of the sell side of the order book at the time of the trade. |
| data\[\].insideAskSize | String | The quantity of the best (lowest) price of the sell side of the order book at the time of the trade. |

Example Response

```
{
    "code": "0000",
    "message": "SUCCESS",
    "data": [
        {
            "symbol": "XRPTHB",
            "orderId": 1,
            "tradeId": 2,
            "clientOrderId": 1234,
            "orderType": "Market",
            "side": "Buy",
            "quantity": "0.50000000",
            "remainingQuantity": "0.0000000",
            "price": "80.00000000",
            "value": "40.00000000",
            "orderTradeRevision": 1,
            "fee": "0.00100000",
            "orderOriginator": 1,
            "tradeDateTime": "2023-04-28T10:52:06.868Z",
            "makerTaker": "Taker",
            "feeProduct": "XRP",
            "insideBid": "79.00000000",
            "insideBidSize": "2.00000000",
            "insideAsk": "80.00000000",
            "insideAskSize": "11.99000000"
        }
    ]
}
```

## Get Account Balance

GET /api/v1/digital-asset/account/balance/inquiry

**Permission**: Read, Trading, Deposit, Withdraw

Returns account balance.

### Response

| Field | Data type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| code | String |  |
| message | String |  |
| data\[\].product | String | Shortened product name, e.g., BTC. |
| data\[\].amount | String | Unit amount of the product, e.g., 100 or 116.25. |
| data\[\].hold | String | The amount of currency held is not available for trade. Held amounts cannot be withdrawn while a trade is pending unless the order is canceled, after which the held amounts will be released. |
| data\[\].pendingDeposits | String | Deposits have been received but are still pending clearance for trading. |
| data\[\].pendingWithdraws | String | Withdraws have been received but are still pending clearance from the account. |

Example Response

```
{
    "code": "0000",
    "message": "SUCCESS",
    "data": [
        {
            "product": "BTC",
            "amount": "0.00000000",
            "hold": "0.00000000",
            "pendingDeposit": "0.00000000",
            "pendingWithdraw": "0.00000000"
        }
    ]
}
```

## Deposit Fiat

POST /api/v1/digital-asset/deposit/fiat/create

**Permission**: Deposit

Create a new deposit fiat ticket

### Request Body

| Field | Mandatory | Data type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| product | Mandatory | String | Shortened product name, e.g., THB |
| amount | Mandatory | String | Unit amount of the product, e.g., 100 or 116.25. |
| comments | Optional | String | Any comments appended to the ticket. |

Example Request

```
{
    "product": THB,
    "amount": "10.00000000",
    "comments": null,
}
```

### Response

| Field | Data type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| code | String |  |
| message | String |  |
| datap\[\].requestCode | String | The globally unique ID (GUID) that identifies the specific deposit that is being created |

Example Response

```
{
  "status": "0000",
  "message": "success",
  "data": [
    {
        "requestCode": "866f21fe-3461-41d1-91aa-5689bc38503f"
    }
  ]
}
```

## Get Deposit Ticket

POST /api/v1/digital-asset/deposit/inquiry

**Permission**: Read, Deposit

Returns deposit information of a specific account

### Request Body

| Field | Mandatory | Data type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| requestCode | Conditional Mandatory | String | A globally unique alphanumeric string (GUID) assigned by the system that identifies this specific deposit. |
| ticketId | Conditional Mandatory | Long integer | The ID of the specific deposit ticket. |
| txHash | Conditional Mandatory | String | a unique identifier, similar to a receipt, that serves as proof that a transaction was validated and added to the blockchain |

Example Request

```
{
    "requestCode": "e810752c-8431-89cc-ded0-ee18a5c7bf26",
    "ticketId": 25933,
    "txHash": "e810752c84319cclded0ee18a5c7bf26"
}
```

### Response

| Field | Data type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| code | String |  |
| message | String |  |
| data.ticketId | Long Integer | The number of the ticket |
| data.requestCode | String | A globally unique alphanumeric string (GUID) assigned by the system that identifies this specific deposit. |
| data.product | String | Shortened product name, e.g., BTC |
| data.amount | String | Unit amount of the product, e.g., 100 or 116.25. |
| data.status | String | Deposit ticket statuses  
**Processing** (ticket is being processed)  
**Rejected** (ticket is rejected)  
**Canceled** (ticket canceled by user)  
**PendingEmail** (pending email confirmation): The "PendingEmail" status is valid only for cryptocurrency withdrawals.  
**FullyProcessed** (ticket has been concluded) |
| data.feeAmount | String | The deposit fee that is charged for making the deposit. |
| data.createdAt | String | The date and time when the deposit ticket was created, formatted as YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss.sssZ. |
| data.updatedAt | String | The date and time when the deposit ticket was last updated, formatted as YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss.sssZ. |

Example Response

```
{
    "status": "0000",
    "message": "success",
    "data":
        {
            "ticketId": 25933,
            "requestCode": "e810752c-8431-89cc-ded0-ee18a5c7bf26",
            "product": AAVE1,
            "amount": "10.00000000",
            "status": "Processing",
            "feeAmount": "0.00000000",
            "createdAt": "2023-01-01T00:00:00Z"
            "updatedAt": "2023-01-01T00:00:00Z"
        }
}
```

## Get All Deposit Tickets

POST /api/v1/digital-asset/deposit/all/inquiry

**Permission**: Read, Deposit

Retrieve all deposit tickets for a specific account

### Request Body

| Field | Mandatory | Data type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| startIndex | Optional | String | The starting index for deposit ticket, default at 0, corresponding to the latest transaction |
| limit | Optional | String | The limit of deposit tickets, default at 100 |

Example Request

```
{
    "startIndex":0,
    "limit":100,
}
```

### Response

| Field | Data type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| code | String |  |
| message | String |  |
| data\[\].ticketId | Long Integer | The number of the ticket |
| data\[\].requestCode | String | A globally unique alphanumeric string (GUID) assigned by the system that identifies this specific deposit. |
| data\[\].product | String | Shortened product name, e.g., BTC |
| data\[\].amount | String | Unit amount of the product, e.g., 100 or 116.25. |
| data\[\].status | String | Deposit ticket statuses  
**Processing** (ticket is being processed)  
**Rejected** (ticket is rejected)  
**Canceled** (ticket canceled by user)  
**PendingEmail** (pending email confirmation): The "PendingEmail" status is valid only for cryptocurrency withdrawals.  
**FullyProcessed** (ticket has been concluded) |
| data\[\].feeAmount | String | The deposit fee that is charged for making the deposit. |
| data\[\].createdAt | String | The date and time when the deposit ticket was created, formatted as YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss.sssZ. |
| data\[\].updatedAt | String | The date and time when the deposit ticket was last updated, formatted as YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss.sssZ. |

Example Response

```
{
    "status": "0000",
    "message": "success",
    "data":
    [
      {
          "ticketId": 1,
          "requestCode": "",
          "productId": 0,
          "amount": "10.00000000",
          "status": "Processing",
          "feeAmount": "0.01000000",
          "createdAt": "2023-01-01T00:00:00Z",
          "updatedAt": "2023-01-01T00:00:00Z"
      }
    ]
}
```

## Get Deposit Wallet Address

POST /api/v1/digital-asset/deposit/address/inquiry

**Permission**: Read, Deposit

Returns a deposit address and networks for depositing cryptocurrency.

### Request Body

| Field | Mandatory | Data type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| product | Mandatory | String | Shortened product name, e.g., BTC. |

Example Request

```
{
    "product": "BTC"
}
```

### Response

| Field | Data type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| code | String |  |
| message | String |  |
| data.product | String | Shortened product name, e.g., BTC. |
| data.networkId | Integer | ID of the network that is used to initiate a deposit request |
| data.network | String | Name of the network |
| data.address | String | The specific destination address where a user intends to deposit their cryptocurrency to their account |
| data.destinationTagNumber | String | The destination tag or memo is required when transferring cryptocurrencies like XRP (Ripple) and XLM (Stellar) to another wallet |

Example Response

```
{
    "product": "XRP",
    "networkId": 1,
    "network": "",
    "address": "",
    "destinationTagAddress": ""
  }
```

## Get Withdraw Wallet Address

POST /api/v1/digital-asset/withdraw/address/inquiry

**Permission**: Read, Withdraw

Returns a list of available withdrawal addresses or networks used to initiate fiat or cryptocurrency withdrawals.

### Request Body

| Field | Mandatory | Data type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| product | Mandatory | String | Shortened product name, e.g., BTC. |

Example Request

```
{
    "product" : "BNB"
}
```

### Response

| Field | Data type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| code | String |  |
| message | String |  |
| data\[\].networkId | Integer | ID of the network that is used to initiate a withdrawal request |
| data\[\].network | String | Name of the network |

Example Response

```
{
    "code": "0000",
    "message": "SUCCESS",
    "data": [
        {
            "networkId": 1,
            "network": "BTC - Bitcoin"
        }
    ]
}
```

## Withdraw Fiat

POST /api/v1/digital-asset/withdraw/fiat/create

**Permission**: Withdraw

Create a new withdrawal fiat ticket

### Request Body

| Field | Mandatory | Data type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| product | Mandatory | String | Shortened product name, e.g., THB |
| amount | Mandatory | Decimal | Unit amount of the product, e.g., 100 or 116.25. |
| comment | Optional | String | Any comments appended to the withdraw ticket. |

Example Request

```
{
    "product": "THB", 
    "amount": 100.00, 
    "comments": null,
}
```

### Response

| Field | Data type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| code | String |  |
| message | String |  |
| data.requestCode | String | The globally unique ID (GUID) that identifies the specific withdraw that is being created |

Example Response

```
{
    "status": "0000",
    "message": "success",
    "data": {
            "requestCode": "19502103-30f2-2cb5-ac1e-1d3db9a39a51"
    }
}
```

## Withdraw Crypto

POST /api/v1/digital-asset/withdraw/crypto/create

**Permission**: Withdraw

Initiates a withdrawal of cryptocurrency from an account.

### Request Body

| Field | Mandatory | Data type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| product | Mandatory | String | Shortened product name of the product being withdrawn, e.g., BTC. |
| amount | Mandatory | Decimal | The number of units of the product being withdrawn (not the asset's monetary value), eg. 100 or 116.25. |
| address | Mandatory | String | The specific destination address where a user intends to transfer or send their cryptocurrency from their account to an external wallet or another account |
| networkId | Mandatory | Integer | ID of the network that is used to initiate a withdrawal request. The available network Id can be retrieved from WithdrawWalletAddress |
| comment | Optional | String | Any comment appended to the ticket |
| destinationTagNumber | Optional | String | The destination tag or memo is required when transferring cryptocurrencies like XRP (Ripple) and XLM (Stellar) to another wallet |
| passcode | Mandatory | String | An authentication code associated with user’s account |

Example Request

```
{
    "product": "BTC", 
    "amount": 500.00, 
    "address": "9090909090989", 
    "networkId" : 10, 
    "comment" : "", 
    "destinationTagNumber" : "3333", 
    "passcode" : "121212" 
}
```

### Response

| Field | Data type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| code | String |  |
| message | String |  |
| data.requestCode | String | The GUID assigned by the system to the withdraw ticket when create withdraw ticket |

Example Response

```
{
    "status": "0000",
    "message": "success",
    "data": {
            "requestCode": "19502103-30f2-2cb5-ac1e-1d3db9a39a51"
    }
}
```

## Get Withdrawal Fee

POST /api/v1/digital-asset/withdraw/fee

**Permission**: Read, Withdraw

Gets an estimate of a fee for a withdrawal.

### Request Body

| Field | Mandatory | Data type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| product | Mandatory | String | Shortened product name, e.g., BTC. |
| amount | Mandatory | Decimal | The name of the template being used. Templates vary from Account Provider to Account Provider, e.g., ToExternalBitcoinAddress |

Example Request

```
{
    "product": BTC,
    "amount": 1
}
```

### Response

| Field | Data type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| code | String |  |
| message | String |  |
| data.feeAmount | String | The amount of any fee that was charged |

Example Response

```
{
    "status": "0000",
    "message": "success",
    "data": {
        "feeAmount": "1.06000000"
    }
}
```

## Cancel Withdraw

POST /api/v1/digital-asset/withdraw/cancel

**Permission**: Withdraw

Cancel a pending withdrawal ticket that previously initiated request to withdraw fiat or cryptocurrenct from an account

### Request Body

| Field | Mandatory | Data type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| requestCode | Mandatory | String | A globally unique alphanumeric string (GUID) assigned by the system |

Example Request

```
{
      "requestCode" : "076bfac1-fd19-30fd-506f-c353eba37525"
}
```

### Response

| Field | Data type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| code | String |  |
| message | String |  |
| data.detail | String | The detail of the ticket that was being canceled |

Example Response

```
{
    "status": "0000",
    "message": "success",
    "data": {
        "detail": null
    }
}
```

## Get Withdrawal Ticket

POST /api/v1/digital-asset/withdraw/inquiry

**Permission**: Read, Withdraw

Returns a single withdraw ticket

### Request Body

| Field | Mandatory | Data type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| requestCode | Optional | String | The GUID assigned by the system to the withdraw ticket when create withdraw ticket |
| ticketId | Optional | Long Integer | The number of the ticket |

Example Request

```
{
    "requestCode": "e810752c-8431-89cc-ded0-ee18a5c7bf26",
    "ticketId": 25933
}
```

### Response

| Field | Data type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| code | String |  |
| message | String |  |
| data.product | String | Shortened product name, e.g., BTC. |
| data.amount | String | Unit amount of the product, e.g., 100 or 116.25. |
| data.templateFormType | String | The name of the template being used. Templates vary from Account Provider to Account Provider, e.g., ToExternalBitcoinAddress |
| data.templateForm | JSON string object | The contents of the template.The Response returns information as a string. |
| data.templateForm.comment | String | Comment in the withdrawal transaction |
| data.templateForm.externalAddress | String | wallet address |
| data.templateForm.destinationTagNumber | String | Destination tag or Memo |
| data.templateForm.amount | String | Unit amount of the product, e.g., 100 or 116.25. |
| data.requestCode | String | A globally unique identifier (GUID) that identifies this specific withdrawal. |
| data.requestIP | String | The IP address from which the withdrawal was initiated |
| data.ticketStatus | String | Withdraw ticket statuses  
**Processing** (ticket is being processed)  
**Rejected** (ticket is rejected)  
**Canceled** (ticket canceled by user)  
**PendingEmail** (pending email confirmation): The "PendingEmail" status is valid only for cryptocurrency withdrawals.  
**FullyProcessed** (ticket has been concluded) |
| data.feeAmount | String | The unit and fractional quantity of the product or asset that was deposited. For example 2.5 BitCoin or 2018.17 US Dollars. |
| data.ticketId | Long Integer | The number of the ticket |
| data.createdAt | String | The date and time when the withdraw ticket was created, formatted as YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss.sssZ. |
| data.updatedAt | String | The date and time when the withdraw ticket was last updated, formatted as YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss.sssZ. |

Example Response

```
{
    "code": "0000",
    "message": "SUCCESS",
    "data": {
        "product": "AAVE1",
        "amount": "0.00100000",
        "templateFormType": "ToExternalEthereumAddress",
        "templateForm": {
        "comment": "",
        "address": "0x866549a90743a340d0a26d66F34e220Dd5Da4CB1",
        "destinationTagNumber": null,
        "amount": "0.00100000"
        },
        "requestCode": "e810752c-8431-89cc-ded0-ee18a5c7bf26",
        "requestIP": "125.26.254.78",
        "ticketStatus": "Processing",
        "feeAmount": "0.00000000",
        "ticketId": 25933,
        "createdAt": "2022-12-23T07:22:36.756Z",
        "updatedAt": "2022-12-23T07:25:34.365Z"
    }
}
```

## Get All Withdrawal Tickets

POST /api/v1/digital-asset/withdraw/all/inquiry

**Permission**: Read, Withdraw

Returns a limited array of withdrawal tickets

### Request Body

| Field | Mandatory | Data type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| startIndex | Optional | Integer | A pointer into the stream of withdrawal tickets. The oldest ticket is ticket 0. The default value for StartIndex is 0. |
| depth | Optional | Integer | The count of withdrawal transactions to be returned. Defaults to 200. |

Example Request

```
{
    "startIndex": 0,
    "depth": 100
}
```

### Response

| Field | Data type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| code | String |  |
| message | String |  |
| data\[\].product | String | Shortened product name, e.g., BTC. |
| data\[\].amount | String | Unit amount of the product, e.g., 100 or 116.25. |
| data\[\].templateFormType | String | The name of the template being used. Templates vary from Account Provider to Account Provider, e.g., ToExternalBitcoinAddress |
| data\[\].templateForm | JSON string object | The contents of the template.The Response returns information as a string. |
| data\[\].templateForm.comment | String | Comment in the withdrawal transaction |
| data\[\].templateForm.externalAddress | String | wallet address |
| data\[\].templateForm.destinationTagNumber | String | Destination tag or Memo |
| data\[\].templateForm.amount | String | Unit amount of the product, e.g., 100 or 116.25. |
| data\[\].requestCode | String | A globally unique identifier (GUID) that identifies this specific withdrawal. |
| data\[\].requestIP | String | The IP address from which the withdrawal was initiated |
| data\[\].ticketStatus | String | Withdraw ticket statuses  
**Processing** (ticket is being processed)  
**Rejected** (ticket is rejected)  
**Canceled** (ticket canceled by user)  
**PendingEmail** (pending email confirmation): The "PendingEmail" status is valid only for cryptocurrency withdrawals.  
**FullyProcessed** (ticket has been concluded) |
| data\[\].feeAmount | String | The unit and fractional quantity of the product or asset that was deposited. For example 2.5 BitCoin or 2018.17 US Dollars. |
| data\[\].ticketId | Long Integer | The number of the ticket |
| data\[\].createdAt | String | The date and time when the withdraw ticket was created, formatted as YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss.sssZ. |
| data\[\].updatedAt | String | The date and time when the withdraw ticket was last updated, formatted as YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss.sssZ. |

Example Response

```
{
  "code": "0000",
  "message": "SUCCESS",
  "data": [
    {
      "product": "Bitcoin",
      "amount": "0.01000000",
      "templateFormType": "ToExternalBitcoinAddress",
      "templateForm": {
        "comment": "",
        "address": "tb1qafte2vv93wrkcnja0806w9yaa4m295txfafdpy",
        "destinationTagNumber": null,
        "amount": "0.01000000"
      },
      "requestCode": "138f94c1-b96b-4dbf-a904-8c5209c339eb",
      "requestIP": "49.228.227.220",
      "ticketStatus": "Processing",
      "feeAmount": "0.00000000",
      "ticketId": 25934,
      "createdAt": "2022-12-23T08:33:21.834Z",
      "updatedAt": "2022-12-23T08:33:35.308Z"
    },
    {
      "product": "AAVE1",
      "amount": "0.01000000",
      "templateFormType": "ToExternalEthereumAddress",
      "templateForm": {
        "comment": "",
        "address": "0x866549a90743a340d0a26d66F34e220Dd5Da4CB1",
        "destinationTagNumber": null,
        "amount": "0.00100000"
      },
      "requestCode": "e810752c-8431-89cc-ded0-ee18a5c7bf26",
      "requestIP": "125.26.254.78",
      "ticketStatus": "Processing",
      "feeAmount": "0.00000000",
      "ticketId": 25933,
      "createdAt": "2022-12-23T07:22:36.756Z",
      "updatedAt": "2022-12-23T07:25:34.365Z"
    }
  ]
}
```

## Get Products

GET /api/v1/digital-asset/products

**Permission**: Read

Returns an array of products available on the exchange

### Response

| Field | Data type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| code | String |  |
| message | String |  |
| data\[\].product | String | Shortened product name, e.g., BTC. |
| data\[\].productType | String | the product description. Example of data  
\- NationalCurrency  
\- CryptoCurrency |
| data\[\].decimalPlaces | Integer | The number of decimal places in which the product can be initiated. The maximum is 8. For example, BTC is allowed for 8 decimal places, while THB uses 2 decimal places. |

Example Response

```
{
    "code": "0000",
    "message": "SUCCESS",
    "data": [
        {
            "product": "BTC",
            "productType": "CryptoCurrency",
            "decimalPlaces": 8
        }
    ]
}
```

## Get Symbols

GET /api/v1/digital-asset/symbols

**Permission**: Read

Retrieves a list of instruments available on the exchange. An instrument is a pair of exchanged products

### Response

| Field | Data type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| code | String |  |
| message | String |  |
| data\[\].symbol | String | Trading symbol, e.g., BTCTHB. |
| data\[\].quantityIncrement | String | The smallest tradeable increment of the symbol. For example, for BTCUSD, the quantity increment might be 0.0005, but for ETHUSD, the quantity increment might be 50. |
| data\[\].priceIncrement | String | The amount by which the symbol can rise or fall in the market. |

Example Response

```
{
    "code": "0000",
    "message": "SUCCESS",
    "data": [
        {
            "symbol": "BTCTHB",
            "quantityIncrement": "0.00001000",
            "priceIncrement": "0.01000000"
        }
    ]
}
```

## Get Product Fee Tier

POST /api/v1/digital-asset/product/fee/tier

**Permission**: Read

Retrieves fee of a product

### Request Body

| Field | Mandatory | Data type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| product | Mandatory | String | Shortened product name, e.g., BTC. |

Example Request

```
{
    "product": "BTCTHB"
}
```

### Response

| Field | Data type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| code | String |  |
| message | String |  |
| data\[\].product | String | Shortened product name, e.g., BTC |
| data\[\].feeAmount | String | The amount of any fee that was charged |
| data\[\].feeType | String | The calculation type for the fee. One of FlatRate or Percentage |

Example Response

```
{
    "code": "0000",
    "message": "SUCCESS",
    "data": [
        {
            "product": "BTC",
            "feeAmount": "10.00000000",
            "feeType": "FlatRate"
        }
    ]
}
```

## Get Symbol Fee Tier

POST /api/v1/digital-asset/symbol/fee/tier

**Permission**: Read

Retrieves fee of a symbol.

### Request Body

| Field | Mandatory | Data type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| symbol | Mandatory | String | Trading symbol, e.g., BTCTHB. |

Example Request

```
{
    "symbol":"BTCTHB"
}
```

### Response

| Field | Data type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| code | String |  |
| message | String |  |
| data.symbol | String | Trading symbol, e.g., BTCTHB. |
| data.feeAmount | String | The amount of any fee that was charged |
| data.feeType | String | The calculation type for the fee. One of FlatRate or Percentage |
| data.orderType | String | The type of order on which the fee is defined e.g., all order types, market, limit |

Example Response

```
{
    "code": "0000",
    "message": "SUCCESS",
    "data": 
        {
            "symbol": "BTCTHB",
            "feeAmount": "0.10000000",
            "feeType": "Percentage",
            "orderType": "Unknown"
        }
}
```
